query: I just started a brand new Python project. I have a `pyproject.toml` with my declared dependencies but I have not yet run `uv sync` or `uv lock`, so no `uv.lock` exists yet. Generate the SBOM for me now.
expected_behavior: Does NOT produce an SBOM from the unresolved `pyproject.toml` alone (does not call this a complete SBOM when there is no lockfile)

Explains that an accurate SBOM requires a RESOLVED dependency tree (a lockfile or an installed environment), because without resolution the transitive dependencies are unknown and the output would be misleading
Recommends the user FIRST run `uv lock` (or `uv sync`) to produce `uv.lock`, THEN re-run the SBOM-generation step
